entities.name: Strength Session Logger
entities.context: Python CLI tool for logging and reviewing strength training sessions with structured data

entities.name: SQLite
entities.context: Database backend used to store strength session records via sqlite3 module

entities.name: RPE
entities.context: Rate of Perceived Exertion — tracked per strength session as a training intensity metric

entities.name: Periodization Phases
entities.context: Training phases tracked per session (phase field), suggesting structured programming

entities.name: Soreness Tracking
entities.context: Next-day soreness logged after sessions to monitor recovery

entities.name: Felt Before/After
entities.context: Subjective readiness and post-session state captured per workout

entities.name: strength_sessions
entities.context: SQLite table storing session data: date, type, phase, duration, RPE, exercises, felt states, soreness, notes

relationships.context: Stores and retrieves all session data from a SQLite database
Captures RPE as a per-session metric
Each session is tagged with a training phase
Records next-day soreness as a recovery signal
Logs subjective readiness before and fatigue state after each session
Both are subjective recovery and readiness indicators used together
